name: Sandwiches Glace
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread slices into assorted shapes as large as possible. Reserve crusts for another use and set bread shapes aside.
2. In a bowl, combine sour cream, pistachios, Italian salad dressing, and dry mustard.
3. Mix in grated cheddar cheese until well combined.
4. Spread the cheese mixture onto bread slices.
5. Cut 2-3 thin slices of smoked ham and place on top of the dressed bread slices.
6. Place sandwiches in a covered container and chill for 60-90 minutes, or until set.
7. In a small saucepan, sprinkle gelatin over water and let it soften for 5 minutes.
8. Heat the softened gelatin mixture over low flame until dissolved. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
9. In a separate bowl, combine mayonnaise and cream. Stir in the cooled gelatin mixture until well blended.
10. Remove chilled sandwiches from the container and spoon the gelatin mixture over each sandwich to cover completely. Garnish as desired.
11. Cover the container and chill for an additional 60-90 minutes, or until set.
12. Serve slightly chilled.
